name: Cheese Olive Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 small, pitted olive without pit and skin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, blend cheese spread and margarine until light and fluffy.
3. Add Tabasco sauce and Worcestershire sauce. Mix well, stirring in flour thoroughly.
4. Use about 1-1/2 teaspoons of dough per olive. Shape dough around each olive.
5. Place balls on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake in the 400°F oven for 12-15 minutes or until light brown.
7. Serve hot or at room temperature.
Yields 25 balls.
